summary.en: All radio equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular IoT) placed on the Moldovan market must obtain ANRCETI radio frequency permit or type approval and be accompanied by a DS (Declaration of Conformity) under Moldovan technical regulations implementing Law 235/2011. CE documentation from the EU may serve as technical evidence for the DS filing but does not replace the mandatory Moldovan DS. CCC and FCC certifications are not recognised.
summary.zh: 所有在摩尔多瓦市场上市的无线设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝物联网）必须取得ANRCETI无线电频率许可或型式核准，并依据《第235/2011号技术法规法》出具DS（符合性声明）。欧盟CE文件可作为DS申报的技术证明，但不能替代摩尔多瓦强制性DS。CCC和FCC认证均不被认可。
summary.zht: 所有在摩爾多瓦市場上市的無線裝置（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂巢物聯網）必須取得ANRCETI無線電頻率許可或型式核准，並依據《第235/2011號技術法規法》出具DS（符合性聲明）。歐盟CE文件可作為DS申報的技術證明，但不能替代摩爾多瓦強制性DS。CCC和FCC認證均不被認可。

standards_or_laws: Law 235/2011 on technical regulations (Republic of Moldova)
ANRCETI radio frequency permit / type approval procedure
SM EN 300 328 (Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz, mirrors ETSI EN 300 328)
SM EN 300 440 (short-range devices, mirrors ETSI EN 300 440)
SM EN 301 489 series (EMC for radio equipment, mirrors ETSI EN 301 489)
EU Association Agreement / DCFTA (partial CE acceptance for DS technical file)

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval and listing on the MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for wireless devices. CCC certification covers electrical safety and basic EMC. GB standards (GB 15629, GB/T 22450 series) define radio performance requirements. SRRC approval and CCC are specific to China and are not transferable to Moldova.
summary.zh: 中国要求无线设备取得MIIT/SRRC无线电型式核准并在MIIT网络接入许可（NAL）名单上登记。CCC认证涵盖电气安全及基本电磁兼容。GB标准（GB 15629、GB/T 22450系列）规定无线电性能要求。SRRC核准和CCC为中国专属，不可转用于摩尔多瓦。
summary.zht: 中國要求無線裝置取得MIIT/SRRC無線電型式核准並在MIIT網路接取許可（NAL）名單上登記。CCC認證涵蓋電氣安全及基本電磁相容。GB標準（GB 15629、GB/T 22450系列）規定無線電性能要求。SRRC核准和CCC為中國專屬，不可轉用於摩爾多瓦。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — GB 4943.1 electrical safety basis

gap.en: SRRC type approval and CCC are not recognised in Moldova. A separate ANRCETI type approval and Moldovan DS must be obtained. SM standards mirror EN/ETSI, so EN-based test reports can support the technical file, but the Moldovan conformity declaration (DS) is a distinct mandatory step. EU CE DoC is partially accepted as technical evidence only.
gap.zh: SRRC型式核准和CCC在摩尔多瓦不被认可。必须单独取得ANRCETI型式核准并出具摩尔多瓦DS。SM标准与EN/ETSI对应，因此基于EN的检测报告可支持技术文件，但摩尔多瓦符合性声明（DS）是独立的强制步骤。欧盟CE DoC仅可部分作为技术证明。
gap.zht: SRRC型式核准和CCC在摩爾多瓦不被認可。必須單獨取得ANRCETI型式核准並出具摩爾多瓦DS。SM標準與EN/ETSI對應，因此基於EN的測試報告可支持技術文件，但摩爾多瓦符合性聲明（DS）是獨立的強制步驟。歐盟CE DoC僅可部分作為技術證明。

source.publisher: ANRCETI (National Regulatory Agency for Electronic Communications and Information Technology, Republic of Moldova)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC approval and CCC do not satisfy Moldovan ANRCETI type approval or DS requirements. New ANRCETI-specific type approval and a Moldovan DS must be obtained before market entry. EN-based test reports (ETSI-mirrored SM standards) may reduce retesting costs but a separate Moldovan conformity declaration is still mandatory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC核准和CCC不满足摩尔多瓦ANRCETI型式核准或DS要求。进入市场前必须取得专项ANRCETI型式核准并出具摩尔多瓦DS。基于EN的检测报告（ETSI镜像SM标准）可降低重新测试成本，但仍须单独出具摩尔多瓦符合性声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC核准和CCC不符合摩爾多瓦ANRCETI型式核准或DS要求。進入市場前必須取得專項ANRCETI型式核准並出具摩爾多瓦DS。基於EN的測試報告（ETSI鏡像SM標準）可降低重新測試成本，但仍須單獨出具摩爾多瓦符合性聲明。
